Use the `options` object to control dynamic behavior. Example: Display an element when max row count is 10: <div ng-if="options.maxRowCount === 10"></div> The `skeleton-container` class is used for loading placeholders. --> <div class="skeleton-container"> <!-- Header Skeleton --> <div class="skeleton-box skeleton-header"></div> <!-- Body Skeleton --> <div class="skeleton-box skeleton-line"></div> <div class="skeleton-box skeleton-line small"></div> <div class="skeleton-box skeleton-line medium"></div> </div>falsemd039ec42d47114f14516b5ac5316d43e98679ef89cb21120000f8d856634c9c4fsp_instanceadmin2026-06-05 09:25:48e7aec82d47114f14516b5ac5316d432522913deb94745cb90516b5ac5316d43012913deb94745cb90516b5ac5316d4301sp_instance_e7aec82d47114f14516b5ac5316d4325admin2026-06-05 10:44:38<url/><widget_parameters><![CDATA[{ "html": { "value": "<!-- Google Fonts & Font Awesome --> <p><link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"></p> <p> </p> <p><link href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.0.0-beta3/css/all.min.css" rel="stylesheet"></p> <style> * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; } body { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; background-color: #F8FAFC; color: #0F172A; line-height: 1.5; } .portal-container { max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 20px; } /* Carousel / Featured Tips */ .carousel-section { background: #F1F5F9; border-radius: 32px; padding: 2rem; margin-bottom: 50px; text-align: center; } .carousel-content { background: white; border-radius: 28px; padding: 2rem; max-width: 700px; margin: 1rem auto; box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); } .carousel-content i { font-size: 2rem; color: #E60000; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .carousel-content p { font-size: 1rem; color: #334155; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .carousel-dots { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 10px; margin-top: 1rem; } .dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; background: #CBD5E1; border-radius: 50%; cursor: pointer; } .dot.active { background: #E60000; width: 24px; border-radius: 10px; } </style> <!-- ========== CAROUSEL / FEATURED TIPS (OOB: Carousel Widget) ========== --> <div class="carousel-section"> <div class="carousel-content"> <p><strong>"Staying hydrated boosts your energy and mental clarity. Drink at least 8 glasses of water daily!"</strong></p> </div> <div class="carousel-dots"> </div> </div>", "displayValue": "<!-- Google Fonts & Font Awesome --> <p><link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"></p> <p> </p> <p><link href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.0.0-beta3/css/all.min.css" rel="stylesheet"></p> <style> * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; } body { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; background-color: #F8FAFC; color: #0F172A; line-height: 1.5; } .portal-container { max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 20px; } /* Carousel / Featured Tips */ .carousel-section { background: #F1F5F9; border-radius: 32px; padding: 2rem; margin-bottom: 50px; text-align: center; } .carousel-content { background: white; border-radius: 28px; padding: 2rem; max-width: 700px; margin: 1rem auto; box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); } .carousel-content i { font-size: 2rem; color: #E60000; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .carousel-content p { font-size: 1rem; color: #334155; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .carousel-dots { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 10px; margin-top: 1rem; } .dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; background: #CBD5E1; border-radius: 50%; cursor: pointer; } .dot.active { background: #E60000; width: 24px; border-radius: 10px; } </style> <!-- ========== CAROUSEL / FEATURED TIPS (OOB: Carousel Widget) ========== --> <div class="carousel-section"> <div class="carousel-content"> <p><strong>"Staying hydrated boosts your energy and mental clarity. Drink at least 8 glasses of water daily!"</strong></p> </div> <div class="carousel-dots"> </div> </div>" } }]]></widget_parameters></sp_instance><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=e7aec82d47114f14516b5ac5316d4325"/></record_update>
